f3b8c6275f16bc48.title: Healthcare Finance Solutions Market Rewriting Long Term Growth Story | PayZen, Walnut, Scratchpay

f3b8c6275f16bc48.summary:
The headline/snippet is too thin to draw meaningful conclusions — it appears to be a market research report or press release that groups Scratchpay with PayZen and Walnut in the healthcare finance solutions space, but provides no specific news about any of the three companies' activities, financials, or strategies.

Significance: low · Category: other

81ac62f1e1ec7d86.title: Scratch Financial, Inc. announces purchase facility with Victory Park Capital to expand technology platform that offers financing options for veterinary care
81ac62f1e1ec7d86.snippet: Scratch Financial, Inc. announces purchase facility with Victory Park Capital to expand technology platform that offers financing options for veterinary care Yahoo Finance Singapore
81ac62f1e1ec7d86.summary:
Scratchpay secured a new purchase facility (debt financing) from Victory Park Capital to scale its veterinary-focused BNPL/financing platform, signaling continued investor appetite for vertical-specific point-of-sale lending. For Snap Finance, this reinforces that the pet/vet care vertical is attracting dedicated capital and competition, though Scratchpay's narrow veterinary focus limits direct overlap with Snap's broader retail lease-to-own model.

Significance: medium · Category: funding
